sourceSummary.oneLine: Curriculum vitae for clinical evaluator Sung Hyun Kim, M.D., Ph.D.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Appendix evidence of the clinical evaluator's education, radiology experience, academic activities, and publications.
keyPoints: Identifies Sung Hyun Kim, M.D., Ph.D. as the clinical evaluator.
Lists education at Seoul National University Medical School and Seoul National University Graduate School of Medicine.

Lists radiology-related professional experience at Seoul National University Hospital, Samsung Medical Center, Bundang Seoul National University Hospital, and Seoul National University Bundang Hospital.
Lists academic activities and journal articles related to radiology, imaging, ultrasound, MRI, and intervention.
